title: Expand use-case test spec coverage for active contexts
summary: Added a Stage 4 coverage checklist and filled missing use-case test specs for Product, Order, and InventoryItem production specs.
results: Documented production-spec to test-spec coverage across active use cases.
Added CreateProduct and UpdateProduct test specs.
Added ShipOrder, DeliverOrder, and CancelOrder test specs.
Added IncreaseStock and Restock test specs.
Recorded remaining Stage 4 gaps that should stay pending until later slices.
